name: Total Equipment Hire
tagline: Professional Restoration & Drying Equipment Hire Across Sydney
description: Total Equipment Hire provides professional restoration and drying equipment across Sydney, supplying air movers, dehumidifiers, air scrubbers, and water extraction machines for flood and water damage situations. We work with plumbers, builders, and restoration companies, offering fast delivery and reliable equipment when it's needed most. With a focus on efficiency and service, we provide 24/7 emergency equipment hire to help get properties dry and back to normal quickly.
shortDescription: Air movers, dehumidifiers, air scrubbers & extraction equipment. Fast delivery. 24/7 emergency hire.
